variants.title: RHR240D10V

variants.description: Genuine Filtrec RHR240N10V3/AB1. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the RHR240N10V3/AB1 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Outer Diameter: 73.5 mm, Inner Diameter: 34.5 mm, Length: 203.0 mm, Seal Material: Viton, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C, Seal: Viton
